scores.correctness_notes: The core concepts are correct: IngressPerAppRequirer class, on.ready/on.revoked events, and self.ingress.url property all exist in the traefik-k8s library. Uses v2 which is more current than v1 referenced in the gold standard. Goes beyond what charmlibs docs cover (which focus on data schemas) but the Python API described is largely accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: strip_prefix as a constructor parameter and provide_ingress_requirements(port=...) as a method are uncertain — these may not exist exactly as described in the actual library API. Minor inaccuracies rather than clear fabrications.
